title: Visa Assistance Fee
scenario: Two weeks before your trip, a website that looks official says your destination now requires an urgent travel authorization. It asks you to upload your passport and pay a high processing fee today.

answers.A: Upload my passport and pay before the deadline.
answers.B: Pay first, then check whether the site is real later.
answers.C: Check entry rules on the official government or embassy website.
answers.D: Use the official visa or travel authorization portal linked by the government site.

explanation: Fake visa and travel authorization sites copy official language and use deadline pressure to collect passport data and inflated fees. Always verify requirements through official government or embassy channels.
proTip: Search for the official government entry-rule page first, then follow only links from that page.
